# Design System: Clean Shopper
**Version:** 1.0
**Last Updated:** 2026-04-03
**Source:** Generated by /design-system-generator skill from brand interview

---

## How to Use This Document
This file is referenced by CLAUDE.md and read by Claude Code at the start of every session. Apply these tokens for all UI work. Do not hardcode hex values, pixel sizes, or spacing values in components. Reference token names from tailwind.config.js instead.

---

## Brand Direction
Clean Shopper's visual identity is uber, masculine, sharp, and epurated. The interface draws from the precision of Uber, the masculine premium feel of Squire, and the generous calm spacing of Headspace. A near-black charcoal base sits on warm off-white surfaces, with a single electric teal accent that delivers impact through restraint. Every element earns its place — nothing decorative, nothing excess.

---

## Color System

### Primary Colors
| Token Name | Hex Value | Usage Rule |
|---|---|---|
| primary | #1A1A1A | Primary buttons, headings, navigation anchors, key UI text. Not used for backgrounds or decorative fills. |
| primary-light | #2D2D2D | Hover state for primary buttons and interactive elements built on primary. Not used as a standalone color. |
| primary-dark | #0D0D0D | Active/pressed states for primary elements. Deepest emphasis. Used sparingly for maximum contrast moments. |

### Secondary Colors
| Token Name | Hex Value | Usage Rule |
|---|---|---|
| secondary | #F5F4F1 | Card surfaces, elevated content containers, modal backgrounds. Not used for page-level backgrounds (use neutral-50 instead). |

### Accent Colors
| Token Name | Hex Value | Usage Rule |
|---|---|---|
| accent | #00DDC0 | The single most important interactive element per view: primary CTA buttons, active navigation indicator, key highlights. Not used for text, backgrounds, or decorative elements. One accent element per screen maximum. |
| accent-dark | #00C4AA | Hover state for accent elements. Not used independently — always paired with accent as its hover variant. |

### Semantic Colors
| Token Name | Hex Value | Usage Rule |
|---|---|---|
| success | #34D399 | Positive states, confirmations, clean product ratings. Used for clean/safe ingredient badges, success toasts, and verified indicators. |
| warning | #FBBF24 | Caution states, partial clean ratings, ingredients that need attention. Used for mixed-result badges and non-critical alerts. |
| error | #EF4444 | Error states, avoid ratings, destructive action confirmations. Used for harmful ingredient flags, form errors, and delete confirmations. |

### Neutral Colors
| Token Name | Hex Value | Usage Rule |
|---|---|---|
| neutral-50 | #FAFAF8 | Page background. The base canvas for the entire application. Warm off-white. |
| neutral-100 | #F5F4F1 | Card backgrounds, surface fills, input field backgrounds. One step above the page canvas. |
| neutral-200 | #E8E6E1 | Borders, dividers, separator lines, input field borders in resting state. |
| neutral-400 | #A8A49E | Placeholder text in inputs, disabled button text, inactive icons, tertiary information. |
| neutral-600 | #6B6660 | Secondary text, supporting copy, metadata, timestamps, input labels. |
| neutral-900 | #1A1A1A | Primary text, headings, body copy. Never use pure black (#000000). |

---

## Typography

**Font Family:** Space Grotesk — a geometric sans-serif with sharp, squared terminals that communicates technical precision and masculine confidence. Clean at body sizes, distinctive at display sizes.
**Source:** Google Fonts

### Type Scale
| Token Name | Size | Weight | Line Height | Letter Spacing | Usage Rule |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| display | 48px | 700 | 1.1 | -1.5px | Hero headlines, marketing moments, landing page headers. One per page maximum. |
| h1 | 36px | 700 | 1.2 | -1px | Page titles, primary view headers. One per view. |
| h2 | 28px | 600 | 1.3 | -0.5px | Section headers within a page, major content dividers. |
| h3 | 22px | 600 | 1.35 | 0 | Card titles, subsection headers, product names in detail views. |
| h4 | 18px | 600 | 1.4 | 0 | Labels, small headers, category names, filter group titles. |
| body | 16px | 400 | 1.6 | 0 | Body copy, descriptions, ingredient lists, analysis text. The default text size. |
| small | 14px | 400 | 1.5 | 0 | Supporting text, metadata, tags, timestamps, badge labels. |
| micro | 12px | 400 | 1.5 | 0 | Legal text, data source attributions, minimal UI labels, timestamps. |

---

## Spacing Scale

Base unit: 8px

| Token Name | Value | Usage Rule |
|---|---|---|
| space-xs | 4px | Icon padding, tight internal spacing within badges and tags. |
| space-sm | 8px | Compact padding within small components, gap between icon and label. |
| space-md | 16px | Standard internal component padding, input field padding, button padding. |
| space-lg | 24px | Card internal padding, section internal spacing, form field gaps. |
| space-xl | 40px | Between components on a page, card-to-card spacing, component group gaps. |
| space-2xl | 64px | Between major page sections, before and after section headers. |
| space-3xl | 96px | Page-level side margins, large section gaps on desktop. |
| space-4xl | 128px | Hero sections, full-bleed vertical spacing, page top/bottom padding. |

---

## Border Radius

| Token Name | Value | Usage Rule |
|---|---|---|
| radius-sm | 4px | Badges, tags, small interactive elements, inline code blocks. |
| radius-md | 8px | Inputs, buttons, small cards, dropdown menus, tooltips. |
| radius-lg | 12px | Cards, modals, larger containers, product cards, dialog boxes. |
| radius-full | 9999px | Pills, avatars, fully rounded toggle switches, circular icon buttons. |

---

## Shadows

| Token Name | Value | Usage Rule |
|---|---|---|
| shadow-sm | 0 1px 2px rgba(26, 26, 26, 0.04) | Subtle card lift on resting state, input fields, tags with elevation. |
| shadow-md | 0 4px 12px rgba(26, 26, 26, 0.08) | Hover states on cards, dropdown menus, popovers, floating elements. |
| shadow-lg | 0 12px 32px rgba(26, 26, 26, 0.12) | Modals, overlays, focused/active dialogs, command palette. |

---

## Usage Rules Summary

These rules apply to every component Claude Code builds for this project:

1. Never hardcode a hex value. Use the token name from tailwind.config.js.
2. Never hardcode a pixel font size. Use the type scale token classes.
3. Never hardcode spacing. Use the spacing scale token classes.
4. Primary color is for the single most important interactive element per view, not for decoration.
5. Neutral-900 for primary text. Neutral-600 for secondary text. Never use pure black (#000000).
6. Semantic colors carry meaning. Do not use success green for anything other than positive states.
7. Accent color appears once per view on the primary CTA. Do not scatter it across multiple elements.
8. Warm neutrals only. No cool grays. The neutral palette is intentionally warm to match the epurated feel.
9. Generous whitespace is a feature, not wasted space. When in doubt, use more space, not less.
10. Shadows use warm-tinted rgba based on primary (#1A1A1A), not pure black. Keep them subtle.
